messages.content: Hi please rephrase this sentence by using some more formal synonims he didn’t give much of a hint on which way the Commission is leaning on the hotly contested topic of a ban on inducements
He provided scant indications regarding the Commission's inclinations on the fiercely disputed matter of prohibiting inducements.

Please rephrase this sentence and use more formal synonims : The EU will include a crackdown on social media marketing of investments to ordinary investors in its retail investment strategy, a top European Commission official said on Thursday. “The rules may not be sufficiently clear and also the supervisors have challenges in monitoring the new forms of marketing communications

On Thursday, a senior official of the European Commission stated that the retail investment strategy of the EU will incorporate strict measures against social media advertising of investment opportunities to the general public. The official further added that the regulatory standards may not be explicit enough, and the supervisors may face difficulties in scrutinizing the recent advancements in marketing communications.
a synonim for envisage
A synonym for "envisage" is "imagine" or "visualize."
can you rephrase this . On this regard, last week we learned from meetings with top officials at the EU commission that the belief that any market failure that needs to be fixed is getting ground,

Regarding this matter, we were informed last week in meetings with high-ranking officials at the EU commission that there is a growing belief that any market failure that requires rectification is gaining momentum.

can you streamline this sentence . On this regard, last week we learned from meetings with top officials at the EU commission that a growing belief that there is any market failure to fix is gaining momentum,
Last week, in meetings with top officials at the EU commission, we learned that the belief in the existence of market failures that require fixing is gaining momentum.

In addition, the Official stated that the retail investment strategy of the EU will incorporate strict measures against social media advertising of investment opportunities to the public, in consideration of the fact that regulatory standards may not be explicit enough, and the supervisors may face difficulties in scrutinizing the recent advancements in marketing communications. rephrase this

Furthermore, the Official declared that the retail investment strategy of the EU will include stringent measures to counteract social media promotions of investment opportunities to the public. This is due to concerns that the regulatory framework may not be clear-cut enough, and supervisors may encounter challenges in monitoring the latest advancements in marketing communications.

The industry has been lobbying hard against a ban. Nina Schindler, chief executive of the European Association of Co-operative Banks (EACB), said inducements make it possible for banks to keep running rural branches and offer advice to less digitally savvy consumers.  rephrase this

Advocating against a possible ban, the industry has been strongly lobbying in its favor. Nina Schindler, who heads the European Association of Co-operative Banks (EACB), argued that inducements enable banks to sustain rural branches and provide consultation services to consumers who are not adept at digital technology.
can you find a synonim softer tha uturn
A synonym softer than "U-turn" could be "reversal" or "change of direction."
Can you tell me until when European Parlaiment is entitled to discuss legislative proposal

The European Parliament is entitled to discuss a legislative proposal until it is decided upon, either by being adopted or rejected. The timeframe for this discussion varies and can depend on numerous factors, such as the complexity of the proposal, the level of agreement among MEPs, and the urgency of the matter at hand. In some cases, the discussion can stretch over several sessions before a final decision is reached.
Yes,but I mean before there are new elections

The European Parliament's power to discuss legislative proposals is not limited by elections. As long as the legislative proposal has not been adopted or rejected, the Parliament can continue discussing it, regardless of any elections taking place. The Parliament is a permanent institution that operates throughout the year, and its legislative work is ongoing.
